case_title: ANITA C LABOSSIERE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 612, LISA BERKOWITZ APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY CCSF. NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (612/HEWLETT)
